Hero.subtitle: We help companies build strategy, platforms, analytics, and AI with real impact.

ValueProposition.title: Our Value Proposition
ValueProposition.pillar1_desc: Quality, ownership, and traceability for frictionless decisions.
ValueProposition.pillar2_desc: Governance and execution to scale analytics and AI without improvisation.
ValueProposition.pillar3_desc: Roadmaps and use cases prioritized by real value and results.

Results.title: The problem isn't technology, it's structural.
Results.subtitle: The Real Challenge
Results.hook: The challenge lies not only in 'having data', but in trusting it and using it effectively. It is essential to adopt an integral approach covering strategy, governance, technology, people, and processes.

points.title: 1. Strategic Integration
points.desc: We connect dispersed systems to create a single source of truth, eliminating duplication, inconsistencies, and wasted resources.

points.title: 2. Governance & Ownership
points.desc: We establish a Data Office with clear roles and defined policies. Data stops being 'everyone's and no one's' responsibility.

points.title: 3. Quality & Pure Trust
points.desc: We implement systematic cleaning processes and metrics so high-stakes decisions are backed by absolute certainty.

points.title: 4. Risk Mitigation
points.desc: We secure regulatory compliance and robust traceability for flawless audits and peace of mind.

points.title: 5. High-Impact Analytics
points.desc: We transform static dashboards into predictive machines that trigger provable business actions.

points.title: 6. Well-Founded AI
points.desc: We build administered infrastructure (MLOps) before scaling models, mitigating algorithm risk from day one.

CallToAction.title: Take the next step
CallToAction.subtitle: Ready to turn information into real results?

Footer.description: Strategic Data Consulting for the corporate sector in Guatemala and Latin America.

Services.title: Services
Services.subtitle: Strategy, architecture, and end-to-end data operations.

services_list.title: Strategic Data Consulting
services_list.desc: Strategic diagnosis and planning of Data & Analytics: defining operating scenarios, maturity assessment, gap analysis, and roadmap design to scale corporate goals.

services_list.title: Data Quality
services_list.short: Standards, measurement, and continuous remediation processes.
services_list.desc: Comprehensive data quality service: definition of standards, monitoring via automated rules, control dashboards, and remediation processes to ensure 100% reliable data.

services_list.title: Governance, Data Office & CoE
services_list.short: Implementation of governance frameworks and management policies.
services_list.desc: Formal establishment of a Data Office, defining roles (Owners, Stewards), corporate management policies, and enabling Data Centers of Excellence (CoE).

services_list.title: Service Unification
services_list.short: Consolidation of ecosystems without operational silos.
services_list.desc: Consolidation of dispersed sources into a unified platform. We eliminate silos by integrating centralized service layers and robust standardized access APIs.

services_list.title: Advanced Analytics
services_list.short: Analytical frameworks oriented to decision making.
services_list.desc: Tailored analytical service: KPIs definition, dimensional modeling, high-fidelity dashboards, and ad-hoc explorations to enable executive control.

services_list.title: Internal Data Platforms
services_list.short: Design of Data Lakes and Lakehouses for efficient consumption.
services_list.desc: Implementation of corporate platforms (Data Lake, modern Data Warehouse). We manage ingestion, transformation, secure storage, and scalable consumption layers.

services_list.title: External Data Platforms
services_list.short: Secure data exchange with clients and suppliers.
services_list.desc: We design data ecosystems to externalize analytics: exchange portals with partners, public API deployment, and secure multi-tenant architectures.

services_list.title: Data Monetization
services_list.short: Financial value capture from informational assets.
services_list.desc: Identification of profitable opportunities: we design data product-based business models, structuring their go-to-market and pricing strategy.

services_list.title: Platform Operations
services_list.short: SRE monitoring, observability, and infrastructure control.
services_list.desc: Continuous platform administration: active monitoring, pipeline observability, cloud cost control, and incident management ensuring high availability.

services_list.title: Applied AI
services_list.short: Production ML use cases under controlled MLOps mitigation.
services_list.desc: AI development on solid foundations: we identify and prioritize use cases, train algorithms, and deploy them under continuous risk management processes (MLOps).

Methodology.title: Data Target Operating Model
Methodology.subtitle: Iterative strategic framework to operationalize data assets with tangible P&L impact.
Methodology.foundation_subtitle: Data is a business asset, not a byproduct of operations.
Methodology.foundation_left_desc: Vision, outcomes, and principles for an information-driven organization.
Methodology.foundation_center_desc: Value creation and attention to corporate priorities.
Methodology.foundation_right_desc: People, culture, governance, and technology for best analytics practice.

steps.title: Strategic Discovery & Baseline
steps.desc: Intensive 2-sprint audit. We map data maturity (Data Maturity Assessment), assess the current technological landscape, and calculate technical debt to establish the baseline.

steps.title: Architecture & Blueprint
steps.desc: We design the Target Operating Model. We define the cloud ecosystem topology, the portfolio of ROI-prioritized business cases, and governance frameworks.

steps.title: Engineering Foundations
steps.desc: Deployment of foundational infrastructure. We build mission-critical pipelines, optimal dimensional modeling, and enable governed semantic layers from day one.

steps.title: Activation (Data as a Product)
steps.desc: We package models and dashboards as executable products for executives. We establish data ownership policies and train functional leaders for adoption.

steps.title: Scale & Continuous Ops
steps.desc: Transition to a managed MLOps / DataOps model. Predictive monitoring of pipelines, continuous quality assurance, and expansion of the strategic roadmap.

Industries.title: Industries
Industries.subtitle: Real experience in sectors with the highest demand for data and analytics.

industries_list.title: Retail & Consumer
industries_list.desc: We optimize inventory, sales, and customer segmentation using predictive analytics and integrated data across physical and digital channels.

industries_list.title: Financial Services
industries_list.desc: Robust governance, data traceability, and risk analysis for institutions operating under strict regulatory requirements.

industries_list.title: Manufacturing & Operations
industries_list.desc: Supply chain visibility, operational efficiency, and predictive maintenance to reduce costs and improve service levels.

industries_list.title: Healthcare & Pharma
industries_list.desc: Clinical and operational data platforms to improve patient care and efficiency of hospital operations.

Insights.title: Insights
Insights.subtitle: Perspectives, trends, and learnings from the world of data and AI for business leaders.

insights_list.title: Demo: Metry Data Platform & Architecture
insights_list.excerpt: Explore how we design comprehensive analytical platforms. From data integration architecture (ETL) to the deployment of executive consumption dashboards in Metabase.

insights_list.title: The Analytical Pyramid: Pillars of a Data Strategy
insights_list.excerpt: Success in data management is not a purely technological aspect, but the harmonization of leadership, agility, and operational governance.

insights_list.title: The Modern Data Stack in 2025: What we adopt and what we avoid
insights_list.excerpt: dbt, Iceberg, Spark, Flink, Snowflake, Databricks... the ecosystem is huge. We share our view on which tools to adopt based on your maturity level and company type.

About.title: Who We Are
About.subtitle: Metry Analytics is a strategic data firm dedicated to designing, building, and managing data and artificial intelligence capabilities on solid foundations.
About.vision_1: Elevate the standard of data and artificial intelligence in Central America and Latin America.
About.vision_2: Transform data into a valuable asset that facilitates decision-making and generates new revenue opportunities.
About.mission_1: Assist executive and technology leaders in transitioning isolated data initiatives into high-value operational capabilities.
About.mission_2: Deliver measurable results through careful planning, operation, and management of sustainable architecture and governance.

pillars.title: Strategic Consulting
pillars.desc: Maturity assessment, data roadmaps, and alignment with business objectives.

pillars.title: Regional Coverage
pillars.desc: Central America and LATAM. Deep knowledge of the business, regulatory, and cultural context of the region.

pillars.title: International Standard
pillars.desc: Global methodologies locally adapted. Team certified in cloud platforms, data governance, and machine learning.

pillars.title: Commitment to Results
pillars.desc: We deliver measurable outcomes. Our proposal includes capability transfer and sustainable governance.

Team.title: Our Leadership
Team.subtitle: Founders with complementary focus to bring data and AI to production with real impact.

members.name: Eduardo Andrino
members.desc: Specialist in data operating model, corporate governance, quality, and monetization. Executive focus on strategic transformations.

members.name: Alejandro Carboni
members.desc: Expert in scalable cloud architectures, modern pipelines, and reliable data platform operations on AWS, Azure, and GCP.

members.name: Bernardo Velásquez
members.desc: Specialist in analytics and AI use cases, responsible deployment, organizational adoption, and production model operations (MLOps).
